headlines.description: Leroy Sane scored twice in the second half as Bundesliga leaders Bayern Munich were made to work hard for a 3-2 win over visitors St Pauli on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bayern hold off St. Pauli, keep title tilt on track

video.headline: Leroy Sane scores again to make it 3-1 Bayern

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Leroy Sane scores again to make it 3-1 Bayern) 2025/03/29 ESHEET
